events.title: Microsoft Viva: Copilot Analytics: "All"- licensed user page Copilot dashboard

events.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Mind Maps in Copilot Notebooks
events.titleJa: Copilot ノートブック に Mind Maps を追加
events.titleEn: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Mind Maps in Copilot Notebooks
events.summary: Mind Maps in Copilot Notebooks are interactive visual artifacts that help users understand notebook content through a grounded map of key topics, themes, and relationships. Users can explore the Mind Map, view summaries for individual nodes, and use Notebook chat to get more detail about a node. Available across OneNo...

events.title: Microsoft Purview: Data Loss Prevention- Data Loss Prevention to safeguard sensitive web search in Microsoft 356 Copilot and Copilot Chat
events.titleJa: Microsoft Purview の会議・チャット機能を更新
events.titleEn: Microsoft Purview: Data Loss Prevention- Data Loss Prevention to safeguard sensitive web search in Microsoft 356 Copilot and Copilot Chat
events.summary: We are expanding Microsoft Purview DLP for Microsoft 365 Copilot and Copilot Chat to safeguard web searches containing sensitive data. This real-time control helps organizations mitigate data leakage and oversharing risks by preventing Microsoft 365 Copilot and agents from using sensitive data for external web search....

events.title: Microsoft Teams: AI-generated meeting archive for knowledge retention
events.titleJa: Teams で AI 生成の会議アーカイブに対応
events.titleEn: Microsoft Teams: AI-generated meeting archive for knowledge retention
events.summary: Admins can enable a tenant-wide policy that allows Copilot (and Facilitator) to retain key insights from meetings beyond transcript retention periods. This enables Copilot to continue answering questions about past meetings even after transcripts expire. Admins can also configure how long this AI-generated meeting arc...

events.title: OneNote: Copilot Notebook in OneNote on Mac
events.titleEn: OneNote: Copilot Notebook in OneNote on Mac
events.summary: Copilot Notebook, an AI-powered workspace for a project or topic built on reference materials, is coming to OneNote on Mac. Bring together your work context behind a project in one place.
events.summaryJa: OneNote の更新 に関する更新。
events.summaryEn: Copilot Notebook, an AI-powered workspace for a project or topic built on reference materials, is coming to OneNote on Mac. Bring together your work context behind a project in one place.

events.title: Microsoft Purview: eDiscovery – Enhancement of Loop and Copilot Pages in Review and Export
events.titleEn: Microsoft Purview: eDiscovery – Enhancement of Loop and Copilot Pages in Review and Export
events.summary: Improves eDiscovery workflows for Loop and Copilot pages by enabling full indexing of page content for keyword search within review sets and adding HTML format support for export from search.
events.summaryJa: Microsoft Purview の更新 に関する更新。
events.summaryEn: Improves eDiscovery workflows for Loop and Copilot pages by enabling full indexing of page content for keyword search within review sets and adding HTML format support for export from search.

events.summary: Discover and add SharePoint agents in chats and channels from in-context store. Users can click on 'Add agents and bots' from the roster drop down. events.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Business Justification for Copilot License Requests
events.titleJa: Microsoft 365 Copilot のセキュリティ・管理・分析機能を強化
events.titleEn: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Business Justification for Copilot License Requests
events.summary: When requesting a Microsoft 365 Copilot license, users can now provide a business justification explaining why they need Copilot. This context is shown to admins during review, helping them make faster, more informed approval decisions and supporting governance and audit needs.
events.summaryJa: Microsoft 365 Copilot のセキュリティ・管理・分析機能を強化 に関する更新。
